title: NIST Special Publication 800-53 Revision 5: Security and Privacy Controls for Information Systems and Organizations - AU-1
authors: National Institute of Standards and Technology
abstract_text: NIST Special Publication 800-53 Revision 5 provides a catalog of security and privacy controls for information systems and organizations.

sections.title: AU-1 source section
sections.text: NIST Special Publication 800-53 Revision 5 places control AU-1 in the Audit and Accountability family. The control title for AU-1 is Audit and Accountability Policy and Procedures. This source section is limited to the named control, its family, and its title for deterministic hard-recall benchmarking.

sections.title: CM-6 distractor section
sections.text: A separate nearby control, CM-6, belongs to the Configuration Management family and is titled Configuration Settings. It is included only as a distractor section for context packing.
